headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on SLB, Raises Price Target to $66
summary: Barclays  analyst David Anderson   maintains SLB (NYSE:SLB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $51 to $66.

raw.headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on SLB, Raises Price Target to $66
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst David Anderson   maintains SLB (NYSE:SLB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $51 to $66.
